  "claims": [
    "Gun Violence Restraining Orders (GVROs) allow police officers to temporarily confiscate guns from individuals who pose a significant risk of harm to themselves or others.",
    "GVROs have been underutilized since their introduction in 2016.",

    "Hospital-based Violence Intervention Programs have proven effective in reducing the cycle of gun violence in many communities.",
